page.title: Admin users
page.description: Manage internal platform users, roles, statuses, permission overrides, and session controls.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or phone

empty.title: No admin users found
empty.description: No internal users match the current filters.
empty.filtered: Try adjusting the filters or search terms.

errors.title: Unable to load admin users
errors.loadFailed: The admin users data could not be loaded right now.
errors.notFound: The requested internal user could not be found.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dialogs.loadingDescription: Fetching the selected user's latest data before opening this action.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Basic account metadata for the internal user.

roles.title: Roles
roles.description: Internal platform roles assigned to this account.

security.title: Security
security.description: Sensitive changes are audited and may require step-up confirmation.
security.selfWarning: This is your own account. Sensitive self-actions are intentionally limited.

permissions.title: Custom permissions
permissions.description: Role permissions are the default. You can allow additional permissions or block specific permissions. Deny always takes priority.
permissions.empty: No custom permissions are currently defined.
permissions.summaryHint: Custom permissions are shown in compact cards so the available width is used more efficiently.

create.title: Create admin user
create.description: Create an internal platform user with the selected role and a secure password.
create.passwordHint: Deliver the password securely out of band. The backend stores only a hash.

validation.displayName: Display name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.password: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.superAdmin: You cannot assign the Super admin role from this account.

edit.title: Edit profile
edit.description: Update safe profile fields for the internal user.

validation.displayName: Display name must be at least 2 characters.

statusModal.title: Update status
statusModal.description: Change whether this internal user is active, suspended, or inactive.

rolesModal.title: Update roles
rolesModal.description: Modify the internal roles attached to this account.
rolesModal.selfWarning: Review this carefully. Self-demotion and last-super-admin protection are enforced by the backend.

validation.superAdmin: You cannot assign the Super admin role from this account.

overrides.title: Custom permissions
overrides.description: Role permissions are the default. You can allow additional permissions or block specific permissions. Deny always takes priority.
overrides.explainer: Role permissions define the default. ALLOW grants an explicit exception. DENY always wins.

validation.operations: Add at least one override operation.

sessions.title: Revoke sessions
sessions.description: This will sign the user out from all active sessions.

tokenVersion.title: Invalidate tokens
tokenVersion.description: This will bump tokenVersion and force the user to re-authenticate.

stepUp.title: Confirm with password
stepUp.description: Sensitive actions require a fresh password confirmation.
stepUp.hint: Your password is never stored or logged.

errors.generic: Step-up verification failed. Please try again.

summary.title: How custom permissions work
summary.description: Role permissions are the default. Check a permission to enable it, or uncheck it to disable it. Changes are saved when you click Save.

matrix.title: Permission matrix
matrix.description: Each module is shown as a compact horizontal matrix. Permission names run across the top, and each cell uses a simple checkbox.

headers.permissionHint: Permission keys stay available as a muted reference.

matrix.roleRowHint: What the assigned roles grant by default.
matrix.userRowHint: Check to grant, uncheck to remove.
matrix.changedCount: {count, plural, one {# permission changed} other {# permissions changed}}
matrix.checkedCount: {count, plural, one {# permission enabled} other {# permissions enabled}}

page.title: Customize user permissions
page.description: Role permissions are the default. Check a permission to enable it, or uncheck it to disable it. Changes are saved when you click Save.
page.loadingDescription: Fetching the selected user's current permission settings.
page.readOnlyNote: You can view custom permissions for this user, but you do not have permission to edit them.
page.saveHint: Changes are audited and may require password step-up before saving.
page.unsavedChanges: {count, plural, one {# unsaved change} other {# unsaved changes}}
page.changeCountValue: {count, plural, =0 {0 changes} one {# change} other {# changes}}

search.label: Search permissions
search.placeholder: Search by permission name or description

moduleCounts.custom: {count, plural, one {# custom permission} other {# custom permissions}}

validation.noChanges: Make at least one permission change.

permissions.unknownPermissionDescription: Custom rule provided by the backend.

adminUsers.title: Admin users
adminUsers.description: Permissions for managing internal platform users.

finance.title: Finance
finance.description: Permissions for finance and accounting workflows.

refunds.title: Refunds
refunds.description: Permissions for refund actions and follow-up.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.description: Permissions for session visibility and support summaries.

careChat.title: Care chat
careChat.description: Permissions for care chat access and decisions.

patients.title: Patients
patients.description: Permissions for patient records and sensitive reads.

other.title: Other
other.description: Additional permissions returned by the backend.
